arts.ttl: Swansea beat Derby to get back to winning ways
arts.sum: Zan Vipotnik and Ronald scored early in the first half to help Swansea bounce back from successive defeats with a 2-1 victory at Derby.

arts.ttl: Derby County player ratings v Swansea as Rams pay the price after woeful start
arts.sum: Derby pushed for an equaliser as Swansea struggled to get out of their half as Dajaune Brown saw a volley go wide of the post while Kane Wilson's header to the back post was cleared. Derby's fans were growing increasingly restless as Swansea continued to enjoy the bulk of possession but Curtis Nelson saw a header saved before Nathaniel Mendez-Laing saw a shot deflected into the arms of Lawrence Vigouroux.

arts.ttl: Derby County 1-2 Swansea City: Visitors hold off fight back to claim victory at Pride Park
arts.sum: Swansea claimed a hard-fought win at Derby County on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Swansea bounce back from successive defeats with victory at Derby
arts.sum: Early goals from Zan Vipotnik and Ronald handed the Swans a deserved half-time lead.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s his job’ – Paul Warne makes ‘charity’ statement amid Derby County man’s struggle for game time
arts.sum: Derby County boss Paul Warne has explained Corey Blackett-Taylor must force his way into the team with the… The post ‘It’s his job’ – Paul Warne makes ‘charity’ statement amid Derby County man’s struggle for game time appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Former Derby County boss Wayne Rooney slams his players after thumping at Norwich
arts.sum: Plymouth head coach and former Rams boss Wayne Rooney conceded his team deserved no better after their 6-1 thrashing by Norwich, with Borja Sainz notching his second hat-trick of the season, leaving Argyle to reflect on a third significant away defeat. Rooney also said, "I have praised them a lot this season for their performances at home – but away needs to much better than this and we have got to get to the bottom of why it keeps happening – it can’t carry on like this."

arts.ttl: Paul Warne issues firm stance as he reveals 'candid' talks with Derby County winger
arts.sum: Paul Warne has revealed he has had a "candid" conversation with winger Corey Blackett-Taylor as the Derby County winger fights for a first-team place. There has been clamour in some quarters for him to play more games but Derby head coach Warne said he discussed the situation with the winger on Monday.
